scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm:debug && npm run copy:wasm:debug && vite
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm:release && npm run copy:wasm:release && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:then:preview: npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.copy:wasm:debug: shx mkdir -p src/wasm public && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-debug/Quoridor.js src/wasm/ && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-debug/Quoridor.wasm src/wasm/ && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-debug/Quoridor.wasm public
scripts.copy:wasm:release: shx mkdir -p src/wasm public && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-release/Quoridor.js src/wasm/ && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-release/Quoridor.wasm src/wasm/ && shx cp build/cmake-build-emscripten-release/Quoridor.wasm public
